FIFO Specification v1.0

1. Overview
The FIFO module implements memory buffer queue.

2. Interface Signals
- clk: 1-bit input clock
- rst_n: 1-bit active-low reset
- wr_en: 1-bit input write enable
- rd_en: 1-bit input read enable
- wr_data: 8-bit input write data
- rd_data: 8-bit output read data
- full: 1-bit output status full
- empty: 1-bit output status empty

3. FSM States
The FIFO uses a 3-state FSM: EMPTY, PARTIAL, FULL
